questions.question: How many wheels does a car have?
questions.explanation: A car has 4 wheels — one on each corner!

questions.question: Count the apples: 🍎🍎🍎 — How many?
questions.explanation: There are 3 apples. Well done counting!

questions.question: What comes after 4?
questions.explanation: We count: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5! Five comes after four.

questions.question: Which number is bigger: 3 or 7?
questions.explanation: 7 is bigger than 3! The higher we count, the bigger the number.

questions.question: How many fingers on one hand?
questions.explanation: One hand has 5 fingers. Hold up your hand and count them!
